description: A plain candid color photograph with no on-image text, graphics, seals, or design overlays. It depicts a smiling young man in a tan U.S. Marine Corps service uniform (short-sleeve khaki shirt with the eagle-globe-and-anchor emblem on the garrison/overseas cap and visible service ribbons on the chest); he has tattoos on his forearms. He holds a blue folder embossed with the gold 'United States Congress' seal and a small handheld American flag. Behind him a large American flag hangs against a bright outdoor harbor/waterfront backdrop. This appears to be a naturalization/citizenship or recognition ceremony photo of a service member. Because it carries no designed text or meme styling, it is a routine candid event photograph rather than an agency-designed graphic; it accompanies a tweet about military members and veterans' eligibility for residence and citizenship.
